visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white sweater, sits in a bedroom setting. She holds a large transparent plastic bag filled with bright red marinated chicken feet and sliced vegetables towards the camera. (2) She opens the bag and pours the contents onto a square glass plate positioned on a table in front of her. The food is heavily coated in a glossy, red chili sauce. (3) Using a bronze-colored fork, she picks up a chicken foot and takes a large bite, chewing with expressive facial movements. The camera remains at a medium-close range, capturing her reactions. (4) She holds up a piece of green vegetable to the camera before eating it. She then playfully covers her ears with both hands, suggesting the crunching sound is very loud, while maintaining a smiling expression. (5) She picks up a small yellow bottle of banana milk and a glass containing some liquid. She pours the milk into the glass and then adds a dark coffee concentrate from a small sachet, stirring the mixture. (6) She takes a sip of the drink using a straw and gives a thumbs-up. She continues eating the chicken feet, ending the video with more expressive chewing and positive gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 🇰🇷韓國最新流行 辣檸檬涼拌雞爪. [Subtitle]: 在韓國為了吃這個 有些人甚至等1-2個月. (2) [Subtitle]: 有點出乎意料的味道耶！ (3) [Variety]: ???. (4) [Subtitle]: 本來以為檸檬配雞爪會怪怪的. (5) [Subtitle]: 結果超級搭！ (6) [Subtitle]: 貢菜 我第一次吃這個蔬菜. (7) [Subtitle]: OMG!!! 超級好吃😍. (8) [Variety]: ( ASMR ). (9) [Subtitle]: 其實韓國之前都沒有這種料理. (10) [Subtitle]: 雖然台灣早就有滷味雞爪凍. (11) [Subtitle]: 東山鴨頭那種. (12) [Subtitle]: 韓國的話. (13) [Subtitle]: 今年開始突然爆紅這個！！！. (14) [Subtitle]: 我的菜. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個咬起來的口感好特別. (16) [Subtitle]: 嗯？. (17) [Variety]: ( 咔咔味到耳膜痛 ). (18) [Subtitle]: 哎 咬起來的聲音大到. (19) [Variety]: 自己都覺得折磨😂. (20) [Subtitle]: 感覺整個頭都在回響😂. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後. (22) [Subtitle]: 後面開始有點辣🥵. (23) [Subtitle]: 辣？那就要喝香蕉牛奶. (24) [Subtitle]: 味道Check!. (25) [Subtitle]: 我要加瘦身咖啡液. (26) [Logo]: 🤎. [Variety]: 🍌. (27) [Subtitle]: 香蕉牛奶咖啡. (28) [Variety]: ( 幸福指數 + 100 ). (29) [Subtitle]: 台灣也有類似辣味涼拌雞爪嗎？. (30) [Subtitle]: 有推薦的雞爪美食的話 請底下留言告訴我😍.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in center frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white ribbed sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom with a bed featuring a floral patterned headboard and white pillows.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-tempo electronic background music with a female vocal hook in English begins immediately. A female voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with an excited and friendly tone, introducing the food. (2) A wet, percussive splashing sound occurs as the saucy chicken feet hit the glass plate. (3) High-intensity, crisp crunching sounds (transients) dominate the mix as the speaker eats. These sounds are recorded with high fidelity to provide an ASMR effect. (4) A series of 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects play in synchronization with visual text updates. The narrator's speech becomes more varied in pitch as she reacts to the spice. (5) Bubbling and pouring liquid sounds are heard as she prepares her drink, followed by a slight metallic clink of a fork or spoon. (6) The video concludes with the music maintaining its energy and the narrator giving a final enthusiastic spoken comment accompanied by chewing sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Demonstration -> Sensory Experience -> Counter-measure -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a trending Korean street food (lemon spicy chicken feet) while providing an ASMR eating experience and sharing a personal drink pairing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically mentions 'slimming coffee' while showing a packet, which is a common format for product placement in lifestyle vlogs.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines ASMR elements with a fast-paced vlog style, using high-density text overlays to maintain engagement.
